reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 6 gates passed. Gate 3 verified: InitializeFromProtoUnsafeFulu (state_trie.go:649-652) directly copies proposer_lookahead without length validation, while SetProposerLookahead (setters_proposer_lookahead.go:18-19) enforces (MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1)*SLOTS_PER_EPOCH. ProcessProposerLookahead (transition.go:34-35) performs array indexing assuming correct length. Attack path requires operator to configure checkpoint sync from malicious source, similar to semi-trusted Engine API model. Per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE client_diversity, Prysm has 31% consensus client share, below High threshold (>33%) but above Medium threshold (>5%). Original severity HIGH downgraded to Medium due to client diversity cap. Classified as CONFIRMED_POTENTIAL rather than CONFIRMED_VULNERABILITY due to requirement for operator configuration action (operator must choose malicious checkpoint sync endpoint), though the vulnerability itself is real once malicious state is loaded. 01e reference: outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W0B1_1771748647.json lines 97-115, invariant text: 'Proposer lookahead length must always be (MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1)*SLOTS_PER_EPOCH after epoch processing.'
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Proposer lookahead length must always be (MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1)*SLOTS_PER_EPOCH after epoch processing.
